creator: pch-freebsd-bugs-1@u-1.phicoh.com
text:
Created attachment 175620
Poudriere log of failed firefox build

Poudriere build of firefox-49.0_8,1 on 10.3-RELEASE-p10 fails during stage

I tried a regular build from ports and that one was fine. But options may be different. 

The build fails with a crash of xpcshell.

I attached poudriere log file (with the middle part removed to make it fit in 1MB).
